samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Detect a single-bit input IN. When the input is 10011, output MATCH is 1, and MATCH is 0 in other cases. Support for continuous input and loop detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to the FSM.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition based on the FSM state.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="S0">Initial state of the FSM.</enum>
        <enum id="S1">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</enum>
        <enum id="S2">State of the FSM when the input is 10.</enum>
        <enum id="S3">State of the FSM when the input is 100.</enum>
        <enum id="S4">State of the FSM when the input is 1001.</enum>
        <enum id="S5">State of the FSM when the input is 10011.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="MATCH" type="combinational_logic">Output signal indicating a match condition based on the FSM state.</reg>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">Current state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="combinational_logic">Next state of the FSM.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <enum_case ref_id="S0">Initialize MATCH to 0.</enum_case>
        <enum_case ref_id="S1">If IN is 0, set MATCH to 0 and transition to S2.</enum_case>
        <enum_case ref_id="S2">If IN is 0, set MATCH to 0 and transition to S3.</enum_case>
        <enum_case ref_id="S3">If IN is 0, set MATCH to 0 and transition to S4.</enum_case>
        <enum_case ref_id="S4">If IN is 1, set MATCH to 0 and transition to S5.</enum_case>
        <enum_case ref_id="S5">If IN is 1, set MATCH to 1 and transition to S0.</enum_case>
    </implementation>
</module>
